# Test testcallgraph integration with bash coverage
env MCP_BASH_COVERAGE=1
env MCP_BASH_COVERAGE_DIR=$WORK/bash-coverage

# Run testcallgraph on a file with bash scripts
testcallgraph -format json testdata/bash_integration_demo.txt

# Check that the output includes bash script edges
stdout 'bash:bash'

-- testdata/bash_integration_demo.txt --
# Demo test with bash scripts
bash 'echo "Running from test"'

exec chmod +x ./demo.sh
bash './demo.sh arg1'

-- demo.sh --
#!/bin/bash
echo "Hello from demo.sh"
echo "Arg: $1"

# Call another script
if [ -x helper.sh ]; then
    bash ./helper.sh
fi

mcpdiff file1.mcp file2.mcp || echo "mcpdiff not found"

-- helper.sh --
#!/bin/bash  
echo "Helper script running"
